title: check_tool_call
description: Validate an agent's tool call against security rules. Checks for unauthorized tool usage, suspicious arguments (e.g. shell injection, path traversal), data exfiltration patterns, and privilege escalation attempts.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool being called

arguments.description: The arguments passed to the tool

agent_id.description: ID of the agent making the call (for permission checking)

allowed_tools.description: Whitelist of tools this agent is permitted to use. If provided, calls to unlisted tools are flagged.
